scope: Acuity v2 visual refresh slices Q1-Q10 — design spec vs implementation

gaps: Motion #3 (count-up) and #6 (streak +1 floater) ship; achievement strip + locked-state progress bar visual confirmation needed via simulator
Subcomponents RecordOrb, RecordWaveform, SpeedometerGauge not fully token-ified
ProcessingProgressBar uses hardcoded colors
Search/filter UI uses hardcoded colors instead of tokens
Heatmap-28 component does not import Acuity primitives
Swipe-to-delete, mood icon rendering, entry row styling not token-based
Spec calls out 'Latest' pill with gradient-wash card variant — verification needed
PRIORITY_COLOR constant from @acuity/shared hardcoded, not token-mapped
Task status tabs (Today/Upcoming/Done) use hardcoded colors for separators/backgrounds
Confetti subcomponent (components/tasks/confetti.tsx) not token-styled
LIFE_AREAS constant lines 252-259 hardcodes 6 area colors (CAREER=#3B82F6, HEALTH=#14B8A6, RELATIONSHIPS=#F43F5E, FINANCES=#F59E0B, PERSONAL=#A855F7, OTHER=#71717A)
STATUS_STYLES constant lines 261-267 hardcodes 5 status colors (NOT_STARTED=#71717A, IN_PROGRESS=#34D399, ON_HOLD=#FBBF24, COMPLETE=#A78BFA, ARCHIVED=#52525B)
area.color references at lines 863-865 use the hardcoded LIFE_AREAS palette
Largest hardcoded surface in the codebase
Implementation is a list/dashboard layout; spec calls for orbital cosmic view with 9 planets
No useTheme() hook import; no token usage at all
Hardcoded #0B0B12 backgrounds, #7C3AED spinner, #FCA85A eyebrow, #FAFAFA text
Missing: 4 concentric ring guides (62/108/152/188px radii), 70 stars overlay, YOU pip with gradient halo, dashed connector lines, 6.0s solar-system entrance animation, glass-blur insight callout
Renders 6 axes from packages/shared/src/constants.ts:123 DEFAULT_LIFE_AREAS
Spec calls for 12 axes — structural difference, not visual
Missing previous-week dashed overlay polygon
Missing hue-colored score dots that flip mint/red on delta
Missing 'Biggest moves' sparkline list section
Component supports gradientColors prop but Insights tab caller doesn't pass it, defaulting to hardcoded violet

dataShape.current: RadarArea[] with area, score (1-10 legacy), score100 (0-100 canonical)
dataShape.specRequires: 12 axes; same scoring shape but extended axis enum

gaps: Default checkbox state is opposite of spec: implementation defaults tasks selected:true and goals selected:!alreadyExists; spec is emphatic that ALL checkboxes default OFF with copy 'Check what to keep, everything is off by default'
Behavior divergence, not visual — visual refresh shipped correctly
Substantive product UX shift: current pattern is 'tap to deselect'; spec pattern is 'tap to select'
Implementation: top-3 life-area ranking picker over 6 areas (Q9 visually refreshed)
Spec: 12-axis Life Matrix baseline step, one axis at a time, 88pt gradient-text big number, hue slider, mini-12-axis radar preview, 'Next axis →' CTA cycling through all 12 axes
Q9 itself flagged this as 'separate future product slice' — confirmation pending whether new step replaces step-7 or coexists
screens.openProductQuestion: Does the 12-axis baseline step REPLACE step-7 or coexist alongside it? Design spec frames it as 'step 3 of 8' suggesting replacement.

screens.shippingSlice: (none — Q2 only touched the Appearance card)
gaps: Uses NativeWind Tailwind className strings throughout (bg-violet-600/20, border-violet-600/40, text-zinc-50 etc.) instead of v2 tokens
Avatar inlined at lines 166-183 instead of extracted to Acuity primitive
Tier badge inlined at lines 190-195 with conditional className instead of using existing TierPill primitive
Hero identity card not gradient-styled per spec
Subscription card not v2-styled
Settings list groups not v2-styled (icon containers, hairline separators, eyebrow labels)

topHardcodedHexFiles.note: in scope — FAB mic button constants

duplicatedComponents.name: Avatar / initials
duplicatedComponents.shouldBe: new primitive apps/mobile/components/acuity/Avatar.tsx with token-based styling
duplicatedComponents.note: design spec uses 64px variant in Profile + 44px variant in Home greeting

duplicatedComponents.name: Tier badge in Profile
duplicatedComponents.note: TierPill is already adopted by 6 other surfaces

crossCuttingFindings.spacingDriftNote: No tokens.spacing.* exists; introducing would unlock a sweep. Padding/margin/gap values hardcoded everywhere.

primitiveAdoption.adoption: low — only Home; should reach Goals + dimension detail
low — only Insights; should reach Tasks, Goals, Profile sub

userReportedUnverified: Segmented tabs overflow the screen — affected screens not identified in this audit, flag for simulator inspection

intentionalNonChanges.reason: intentional per Q8 spec — fixed warm accents that pop against any palette

intentionalNonChanges.case: DEFAULT_LIFE_AREAS data hex codes in packages/shared/src/constants.ts
intentionalNonChanges.reason: theme-identity data colors used by web consumers; keep as data, don't use for mobile surfaces

remediationPlan.title: Visual sweep — token-ify colors + radius + extract FAB/Avatar primitives
subSteps: 3. Insights MOOD_COLORS + LifeMapRadar gradientColors pass-through (insights.tsx + life-map-radar.tsx)
4. Profile screen + Avatar primitive extraction (profile.tsx + new Avatar.tsx)
6. Theme Map sub-components — visual only, not orbital rebuild (theme-map/*)
7. Modal + detail screen sweep (delete-account-modal, task/[id], goal/[id], dimension/[key], paywall, subscribe)
remediationPlan.sequencingNotes: Foundation for all subsequent phases — reduces drift risk in D/E

remediationPlan.title: Extract review default-OFF behavior fix
remediationPlan.specCopy: Check what feels right. Everything is off by default — keep only what you want to follow.
remediationPlan.uxImplication: Inverts current user expectation — communicate to support/onboarding/sales

remediationPlan.title: Onboarding Life Matrix 12-axis baseline step
openProductQuestions: Replace step-7 (top-3 picker) entirely or coexist?
Payload shape: extend lifeAreaPriorities to carry score-per-axis or add new field?
remediationPlan.sequencingNotes: Must follow Phase D (12-axis data settled) and Phase A (clean visual chrome)

remediationPlan.title: Life Matrix 12-axis expansion — shared constant + extraction pipeline + radar
fileTouchPoints: DB backfill for existing LifeMapArea rows (new areas per user)
remediationPlan.criticalRisk: Live build-42 binary may read 6-axis data; if extraction starts producing 12-axis output, build-42 mis-renders or drops axes. Need wire-compatible expansion (keep original 6 as enum subset).
remediationPlan.sequencingNotes: Hardest item; unblocks Phase E (planet hues) and Phase C (axes settled)

remediationPlan.title: Theme Map orbital cosmos rebuild
specElements: 9 planets across 4 concentric ring guides (62/108/152/188px radii)
YOU pip with gradient halo + dashed connector lines
6.0s solar-system entrance animation (easeOutCubic, stagger 300ms per ring, first focus per session only)
remediationPlan.sequencingNotes: Last phase; isolated to one new screen file. Run after Phase D for canonical hue palette.

phaseSummary.rationale: A (foundation, lowest risk first), B (small, isolated), D (unblocks C+E), C (depends on D), E (last, leverages clean tokens + canonical hues)

openProductQuestions.question: Confirm extract-review checkbox default OFF is the intended UX direction? Current users have built muscle memory around default ON (tap to deselect).
Does the new 12-axis baseline step REPLACE step-7 (top-3 ranking picker) or coexist? Spec frames it as 'step 3 of 8' suggesting replacement.
Does the live build-42 binary need backward-compatible 6-axis subset? If so, the 12 axes must include the original 6 as a stable enum subset.
